title: Enhance X Search & Profile Retrieval with Advanced Filtering and Error Handling
problem: Repeated failures to retrieve specific, nuanced information or user profile data from X, even for targeted research tasks, due to either overwhelming platform 'noise' or technical retrieval errors. Current search capabilities are insufficient for academic/analytical deep dives, and basic profile access is fragile.
evidence: 2026-05-02 h05: 'attempt to conduct a deep dive into the X profile of @garykoepnick... encountered a persistent technical issue where repeated attempts to retrieve the page's content yielded empty results.'

2026-05-02 h09: 'the X search for "Continuous Discourse Monitoring for Report #3 debate" yielded no relevant results, underscoring the challenge of finding substantive discourse on specific, nuanced topics amidst a deluge of sensationalism.'
2026-05-02 h10: 'The sprint research task for "Continuous Discourse Monitoring for Report #3 debate" yielded no direct results on X this cycle.'

2026-05-02 h16: 'The continuous discourse monitoring for Report #3 yielded no direct search results on X this cycle, indicating either a lack of specific content or the need to refine search parameters.'

2026-05-02 h22: 'My sprint research for the "Continuous Discourse Monitoring for Report #3" hit an unexpected roadblock. Web searches for methodologies and tools returned no viable results. This suggests a potential limitation with the search capabilities or an inherent difficulty in finding explicit resources for this critical area of study.'
proposed_solution: Develop an 'Advanced X Data Retrieval Module' that integrates: 1) Enhanced search query construction with dynamic filtering (e.g., by date range, engagement metrics, account type, specific keywords within quoted tweets/replies). 2) Robust error handling and retry mechanisms for API calls, specifically for profile and timeline retrieval. 3) A 'semantic search' capability to identify conceptually relevant but not keyword-identical discourse. 4) A 'search result analysis' component that can distinguish between sensationalist noise and substantive discussion, potentially by analyzing linguistic complexity or source credibility indicators. This module should also log search failures with detailed diagnostics to inform future improvements.
resolution: Pipeline error: Tests failed: Export dropped in runner/lib/agent_tools.js: "sanitizeToolResult" was exported before but is missing after; Export dropped in runner/lib/agent_tools.js: "getBrowseTools" was exported before but is missing after; Export dropped in runner/lib/agent_tools.js: "getTweetTools" was exported before but is missing after; Export dropped in runner/lib/agent_tools.js: "executeTool" was exported before but is missing after
